intro_wave_1.speaker: minotaur
intro_wave_1.text: So... the labyrinth spits up another lamb.

intro_wave_1.speaker: theseus
intro_wave_1.text: I came to finish what Athens started.

intro_wave_1.speaker: minotaur
intro_wave_1.text: Brave words. Let's see if the sword behind them is just as loud.

intro_wave_2.speaker: minotaur
intro_wave_2.text: Back again? Or did they send another one?

intro_wave_2.speaker: theseus
intro_wave_2.text: There are always more of us.

intro_wave_3.speaker: minotaur
intro_wave_3.text: You don't even look like the others anymore.

hero_death_wave_2.speaker: minotaur
hero_death_wave_2.text: Athens runs out of sons before I run out of patience.

game_over.speaker: theseus
game_over.text: It's over. The labyrinth is empty now.

game_over.speaker: minotaur
game_over.text: Empty? No. The labyrinth IS me.
